project: AI Video Production Workspace Three Route Plan
title: RunningHub Adapter Skeleton And Offline Tests
scope: add request builders, response parsers, error mappers, and offline tests
do not call RunningHub or Runway
goal: Implement the local RunningHub adapter skeleton required by the R3-8G frozen contract while keeping the whole task offline.
acceptance: RunningHub remains the primary provider in the registry.
Request summaries exclude API keys, Authorization values, raw binary data, base64, and raw provider payloads.
Synthetic response parsers cover upload data.download_url, submit taskId/status/errorCode/errorMessage, and query results[].url.
Error mapping covers invalid API key, rate limit, insufficient permission/credits, content safety, timeout, generation failure, and unknown provider failure where possible.
RunningHubVideoProviderAdapter remains fail-closed for real network execution unless a later exact live-call task authorizes it.

No RunningHub call, Runway call, provider upload, status poll, output download, provider credit consumption, real video generation, secret value output, source overwrite, push, tag, release, or deploy occurs.
boundary_or_safety_stop: provider live call forbidden in this task
safe_actions_completed: implemented offline RunningHub upload, submit, and query request builders
implemented synthetic RunningHub upload, submit, and query response parsers
implemented sanitized RunningHub error mapping for official failure classes
next_safe_option: Worker may claim R3-8H for offline adapter implementation only.
Do not perform a live RunningHub upload, submit, query, or output download without a future exact current Jenn authorization phrase.
